landing.title: Smart Classroom
landing.description: Smart Classroom unifies course operations, assignment workflows, student submissions, and academic oversight in a single modern platform.

preview.teacherValue: Course management, assignment planning, and review workflows in one operational surface.
preview.studentValue: Courses, deadlines, and submissions presented in a clear academic workflow.
preview.flowValue: Assignments, submissions, and activity data remain synchronized through the API layer.

highlights.roleDashboardsDescription: Teacher and student experiences are separated with clear operational boundaries.
highlights.postgresDescription: A reliable relational foundation built for academic data and long-term extensibility.
highlights.authDescription: JWT-based authentication with protected routes and role-aware access control.

auth.loginDescription: Access the Smart Classroom workspace that matches your role.
auth.registerDescription: Create a teacher or student account to access the relevant workspace.
auth.spotlightLoginTitle: Access your academic workspace with secure, role-based authentication.
auth.spotlightLoginDescription: Smart Classroom presents teacher and student operations in a structured, modern product experience.
auth.spotlightRegisterTitle: Create your account for a modern academic operations environment.
auth.spotlightRegisterDescription: Set up a teacher or student profile to access the appropriate dashboard and workflow tools.
auth.loginBullet1: Secure role-based access for teachers and students
auth.loginBullet2: Clear workspaces for courses, assignments, and submissions
auth.loginBullet3: Modern interface with strong hierarchy and fast access
auth.registerBullet1: Teacher accounts manage courses and review workflows
auth.registerBullet2: Student accounts track coursework, submissions, and progress
auth.registerBullet3: Built on a scalable relational foundation
auth.passwordHint: Use at least 6 characters for your account password.
auth.studentDescription: Track courses, assignments, and submission status.
auth.teacherDescription: Manage courses, assignments, and academic operations.
auth.validationFixErrors: Please fix the highlighted fields before continuing.
auth.validationSubmitFailed: Unable to submit the form right now. Please try again.
auth.validationNameLength: Full name must be at least 3 characters.
auth.validationEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.validationPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.loginSuccess: Sign-in successful. Redirecting to your dashboard...
auth.registerSuccess: Account created successfully. Redirecting to the appropriate workspace...

nav.workspaceDescription: A modern platform designed for course operations, assignments, and student workflows.
nav.teacherWorkspace: Teacher workspace for course, assignment, and review operations
nav.studentWorkspace: Student workspace for courses, submissions, and progress tracking
nav.footer: Professional platform infrastructure designed for academic operations.

guard.preparingDescription: We are restoring your session and verifying access permissions.

teacherDashboard.title: Teacher Dashboard
teacherDashboard.description: A central workspace for course management, assignment planning, and review operations.
teacherDashboard.heroTitle: Manage classes, assignments, and review workflows from a single operational surface.
teacherDashboard.heroDescription: This dashboard combines live metrics, selected course context, and recent activity in one structured view.
teacherDashboard.focusPendingReviewsDesc: {count} submissions are still waiting for grading.
teacherDashboard.focusUpcomingDeadlinesDesc: {count} assignments need attention in the next 7 days.
teacherDashboard.focusNoSubmissionsDesc: New student work will surface here as soon as it arrives.
teacherDashboard.performanceDesc: Average grade trend across your latest graded assignments.
teacherDashboard.performanceEmptyDesc: Performance trends will appear once submissions receive grades.
teacherDashboard.submissionsTrendDesc: Daily submission volume across your classes during the last 7 days.
teacherDashboard.submissionsTrendEmptyDesc: This chart will populate after students start submitting work.
teacherDashboard.loadErrorTitle: Unable to load the teacher dashboard
teacherDashboard.partialErrorTitle: Some data could not be refreshed
teacherDashboard.coursePortfolioDesc: A high-level view of all teacher-managed courses.
teacherDashboard.noCoursesDesc: Create your first course to start organizing assignments and student enrollment.
teacherDashboard.recentAssignmentsDesc: The latest coursework published across your classes.
teacherDashboard.noAssignmentsDesc: Assignments will appear here once teachers start publishing coursework.
teacherDashboard.recentSubmissionsDesc: Latest student deliveries across teacher-owned courses.
teacherDashboard.noSubmissionsDesc: Incoming student work will appear here once assignments are submitted.
teacherDashboard.activityTimelineDesc: A concise record of your recent classroom actions.
teacherDashboard.noActivityDesc: Teacher actions such as course creation and assignment publishing will appear here.

studentDashboard.title: Student Dashboard
studentDashboard.description: A structured workspace for courses, deadlines, submissions, and academic progress.
studentDashboard.heroTitle: Track courses, upcoming deadlines, and submission status from a single dashboard.
studentDashboard.heroDescription: This view prioritizes the information students need most: enrolled courses, pending work, and recent submissions.
studentDashboard.heroMeta3: Soft motion and polished loading states
studentDashboard.focusNextDeadlineNoneDesc: No upcoming assignments are waiting right now.
studentDashboard.focusAverageScoreDesc: Calculated from the latest graded assignments in your history.
studentDashboard.focusNoSubmissionsDesc: Your recent delivery will appear here after the first submission.
studentDashboard.performanceDesc: Track how your scores move across recent graded assignments.
studentDashboard.performanceEmptyDesc: Performance history appears after your work starts getting graded.
studentDashboard.submissionTrendDesc: See how many submissions you completed during the last 7 days.
studentDashboard.submissionTrendEmptyDesc: Your weekly submission pattern will show up after you submit work.
studentDashboard.loadErrorTitle: Unable to load the student dashboard
studentDashboard.upcomingAssignmentsDesc: Work ordered by due date to keep students focused.
studentDashboard.noPendingDesc: You are fully caught up or no new assignments have been posted yet.
studentDashboard.courseSpacesDesc: A quick overview of the classrooms you are enrolled in.
studentDashboard.noCoursesDesc: Course cards will appear here once the student is enrolled.
studentDashboard.recentSubmissionsDesc: Your latest delivered work, organized for review.
studentDashboard.noSubmissionsDesc: Completed work will appear here after the student submits assignments.
studentDashboard.recentActivityDesc: A quick timeline of your latest platform actions.
studentDashboard.noActivityDesc: Student actions such as logging in or submitting work will appear here.

courseCard.defaultDescription: A well-structured course space ready for classroom activity.

teacherWorkspace.courseSectionDesc: Create new course spaces and switch between active classes.
teacherWorkspace.courseTitleRequired: Add a course title before continuing.
teacherWorkspace.courseDescriptionPlaceholder: What should students know about this course?
teacherWorkspace.courseCreateSuccess: Course created. Share code {code} with students.
teacherWorkspace.courseCreateError: Unable to create the course right now.
teacherWorkspace.selectCourseHint: Select or create a course to continue.
teacherWorkspace.selectAssignmentHint: Select an assignment to open the grading queue.
teacherWorkspace.assignmentSectionDesc: Publish work for the selected course and review due dates in one place.
teacherWorkspace.assignmentTitleRequired: Add an assignment title before publishing.
teacherWorkspace.assignmentDueDateRequired: Select a due date before publishing.
teacherWorkspace.assignmentDescriptionPlaceholder: Explain the task, expected output, and grading notes.
teacherWorkspace.assignmentSelectCourse: Choose a course before creating an assignment.
teacherWorkspace.assignmentsLoadError: Unable to load assignments for this course.
teacherWorkspace.reviewSectionDesc: Grade submitted work and add feedback without leaving the dashboard.
teacherWorkspace.reviewLoadError: Unable to load the grading queue.
teacherWorkspace.reviewFeedbackPlaceholder: Add a short note for the student.
teacherWorkspace.noSubmissionsDesc: Student work for this assignment will appear here as soon as it is submitted.
teacherWorkspace.activitySectionDesc: Live classroom events across joins, assignments, submissions, and grading.

studentWorkspace.courseSectionDesc: Join with a course code, then switch between enrolled classes.
studentWorkspace.joinCourseCodeRequired: Enter a course code to continue.
studentWorkspace.selectCourseHint: Join or select a course to view assignments.
studentWorkspace.assignmentSectionDesc: Everything due in the selected course, with direct submission support.
studentWorkspace.assignmentsLoadError: Unable to load assignments for this course.
studentWorkspace.submissionContentRequired: Add your submission content before sending it.
studentWorkspace.submissionPlaceholder: Paste your answer, summary, or link here.
studentWorkspace.activitySectionDesc: Recent events from your courses and submissions.
